creator: hasan.diwan+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 250189
Patch to mke this possible

Got port building under FreeBSD 14 and working, from the pkgsrc source -- https://ftp.jaist.ac.jp/pub/pkgsrc/distfiles/sirc/sirc-2.211.tar.gz

If this is of interest, my followup comment will include a full port -- Makefile, distinfo, pkg-descr, and pkg-plist and will include the attachment in the files subdirectory. Many thanks for the quick turnaround.
